_doc: Cross-page state slots for the Population Atlas. Round 1 declares the SHARED slots the atlas is likely to read (activeChrom from the Inversion Atlas, candidate for cross-atlas hand-off) and the page-private slots consumed by the lifted-verbatim breeding (page8) + hatchery-health (page9) JS. Page-private slots match the names used by the scaffold's inline JS (window.state._breedingPage / window.state._hatcheryHealth) so the verbatim-lifted code keeps working unchanged.
_round1_status: Cross-atlas slots (activeChrom, candidate) declared but not yet consumed by any page renderer. Page-private slots (_breedingPage, _hatcheryHealth) consumed by page8 / page9 directly.

activeChrom._doc: Cross-atlas: the active chromosome in the Inversion Atlas. Population Atlas listens for changes when per-chromosome views land (e.g. a chrom-resolved F_ROH or θπ strip).

candidate._doc: Cross-atlas: the active inversion candidate. Future use — enable cross-atlas deep-link to the breeding page filtered by the candidate's carrier set.

_breedingPage._doc: Page8 breeding-table UI state — { view_mode, filter_status, filter_source, user_rows, derived_rows, metadata }. Lifted-verbatim shape from the scaffold's _bpEnsureState().

_hatcheryHealth._doc: Page9 F_ROH × H plane state — { cohorts: [{cohort, species, F_ROH, H_per_site, H_ref, is_focal, citation, notes, ref_url}], metadata }. Lifted-verbatim shape from the scaffold's _fhhEnsureState().

perSampleStats._doc: Per-sample summary stats consumed by the breeding page's auto-derivation hooks (top-1% F_ROH / θπ / burden). Shape: array of { sample, F_ROH, theta_pi, het, deleterious_burden, ... }. Produced by MODULE_2B + MODULE_3 + MODULE_CONSERVATION rollup; not yet registered as a layer source.

familyClusters._doc: Family-cluster manifest consumed by the breeding page's auto-derivation hook (largest family cluster → yellow). Shape: { largest_cluster_size, clusters: [{cluster_id, members: [sample]}] }.

inversionCarriers._doc: Cross-atlas import from the Inversion Atlas karyotype assignments. Shape: array of { sample, inversion_id, frequency_in_cohort }.

markerControls._doc: Cross-atlas import from the Inversion Atlas page18 marker_panel.json controls block. Shape: array of { sample, marker_id, role: 'positive_INV' | 'positive_HET' | 'negative_STD' }.
